query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `notes` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `rawText` text NOT NULL, `category` varchar(64), `subCategory` varchar(64), `title` text, `description` text, `deadline` timestamp, `tags` json, `aiProcessed` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `aiRawResponse` text, `completed` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `completedAt` timestamp, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `notes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
